response.justification: Currently a Staff engineer at re:cinq leading AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—a role directly aligned with the position's requirements. However, the resume documents less than 2 years of AI-focused experience versus the required 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and lacks explicit evidence of Python proficiency and vector database/RAG architecture knowledge. The current role suggests deeper AI expertise than documented; an interview would clarify this gap.
strengths: Currently leading AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocol work at Staff level, directly aligned with job's primary responsibilities
20+ years of software engineering with documented ability to mentor teams, lead technical discovery, and drive engineering excellence
Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS/cloud platform expertise with proven system design and performance optimization background
concerns: Resume shows only ~1 year of dedicated AI/ML work versus the required 8+ years of production AI solutions experience
Python language proficiency not mentioned despite being a required technology for the role
No documented experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, both explicitly required qualifications

key_factors.factor: Current Staff-level AI-agent infrastructure role at re:cinq
Only ~1 year documented AI experience vs 8+ years required
Missing documented Python and vector database/RAG architecture experience
